nasb.text: for He had healed many, with the result that all those who had afflictions pressed around Him in order to touch Him.

esv.text: for he had healed many, so that all who had diseases pressed around him to touch him.

cnv.text: 他醫好了許多人，所以凡有病的都擠過來要摸他。

ccb.text: 因为祂医好了很多人，凡有疾病的人都想挤过来摸祂。

csbs.text: 因为他使许多人痊愈，所以有病痛的人都向他挤过来，想要摸到他。
